---
title: "Week 08"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (4/06)
:::

**Topics**

-   Summaries of distributions
-   Moments

**Daily assignment**

-   None! But the [attached PDF](daily/DA_21.pdf) contains the learning objectives for today's class.
-   Maybe get a head start on reviewing power and Taylor series from Calc 2 for next class, by reviewing notes from previous semesters or watching [this video](https://expl.ai/EQDQEDX) (also linked in next daily assignment)

**Class activity**

-   None

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/08)
:::

**Topics**

-   Moment generating functions

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment (I don't suggest completing until after Monday's class, as content requires concepts from Monday!)

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (4/10)
:::

*Last day to drop classes*

**Topics**

-   Joint distributions

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   TBD
